Uses of Class
com.irurueta.units.TimeUnit

    • Uses of TimeUnit in com.irurueta.units

      Methods in com.irurueta.units that return TimeUnit 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      TimeUnit TimeFormatter.findUnit​(java.lang.String source)
      Attempts to determine a time unit within a measurement string representation.
      static TimeUnit[] TimeUnit.getMetricUnits()
      Gets all supported metric time units.
      static TimeUnit[] TimeUnit.getNonInternationalSystemUnits()
      Gets all supported units not belonging to the International System of Units.
      static TimeUnit TimeUnit.valueOf​(java.lang.String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.
      static TimeUnit[] TimeUnit.values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.
      Methods in com.irurueta.units with parameters of type TimeUnit 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void Time.add​(double value, TimeUnit unit)
      Adds provided time value and unit and updates current time instance.
      static double Time.add​(double value1, TimeUnit unit1, double value2, TimeUnit unit2, TimeUnit resultUnit)
      Adds two time values and units and returns the result.
      void Time.add​(java.lang.Number value, TimeUnit unit)
      Adds provided time value and unit and updates current time instance.
      static java.lang.Number Time.add​(java.lang.Number value1, TimeUnit unit1, java.lang.Number value2, TimeUnit unit2, TimeUnit resultUnit)
      Adds two time values and units and returns the result.
      Time Time.addAndReturnNew​(double value, TimeUnit unit, TimeUnit resultUnit)
      Adds provided time value and unit and returns a new time instance using provided unit.
      static Time Time.addAndReturnNew​(Time arg1, Time arg2, TimeUnit unit)
      Adds two time instances.
      Time Time.addAndReturnNew​(Time t, TimeUnit unit)
      Adds provided time to current instance and returns a new time instance.
      Time Time.addAndReturnNew​(java.lang.Number value, TimeUnit unit, TimeUnit resultUnit)
      Adds provided time value and unit and returns a new time instance using provided unit.
      static double TimeConverter.convert​(double input, TimeUnit inputUnit, TimeUnit outputUnit)
      Converts a time value from input unit to provided output unit.
      static void TimeConverter.convert​(Time time, TimeUnit outputUnit)
      Converts and updates a time to requested output unit.
      static void TimeConverter.convert​(Time input, TimeUnit outputUnit, Time result)
      Converts a time to requested output unit.
      static java.lang.Number TimeConverter.convert​(java.lang.Number input, TimeUnit inputUnit, TimeUnit outputUnit)
      Converts a time value from input unit to provided output unit.
      static Time TimeConverter.convertAndReturnNew​(Time input, TimeUnit outputUnit)
      Converts a time to requested output unit.
      java.lang.String TimeFormatter.format​(java.lang.Number value, TimeUnit unit)
      Formats provided time value and unit into a string representation.
      java.lang.StringBuffer TimeFormatter.format​(java.lang.Number value, TimeUnit unit, java.lang.StringBuffer toAppendTo, java.text.FieldPosition pos)
      Formats provided time value and unit into a string representation and appends the result into provided string buffer.
      java.lang.String TimeFormatter.formatAndConvert​(java.lang.Number value, TimeUnit unit, UnitSystem system)
      Formats and converts provided time value and unit.
      java.lang.String TimeFormatter.getUnitSymbol​(TimeUnit unit)
      Returns unit string representation.
      static UnitSystem TimeUnit.getUnitSystem​(TimeUnit unit)
      Returns unit system for provided time unit.
      static boolean TimeUnit.isMetric​(TimeUnit unit)
      Indicates whether provided unit belongs to the metric unit system.
      static boolean TimeUnit.isNonInternationalSystem​(TimeUnit unit)
      Indicates whether provided unit belongs to the International System of units.
      void Time.subtract​(double value, TimeUnit unit)
      Subtracts provided time value and unit and updates current time instance.
      static double Time.subtract​(double value1, TimeUnit unit1, double value2, TimeUnit unit2, TimeUnit resultUnit)
      Subtracts two time values and units and returns the result.
      void Time.subtract​(java.lang.Number value, TimeUnit unit)
      Subtracts provided time value and unit and updates current time instance.
      static java.lang.Number Time.subtract​(java.lang.Number value1, TimeUnit unit1, java.lang.Number value2, TimeUnit unit2, TimeUnit resultUnit)
      Subtracts two time values and units and returns the result.
      Time Time.subtractAndReturnNew​(double value, TimeUnit unit, TimeUnit resultUnit)
      Subtracts provided time value and unit and returns a new time instance using provided unit.
      static Time Time.subtractAndReturnNew​(Time arg1, Time arg2, TimeUnit unit)
      Subtracts two time instances.
      Time Time.subtractAndReturnNew​(Time t, TimeUnit unit)
      Subtracts provided time to current instance and returns a new instance.
      Time Time.subtractAndReturnNew​(java.lang.Number value, TimeUnit unit, TimeUnit resultUnit)
      Subtracts provided time value and unit and returns a new time instance using provided unit.

      Determines if two time instances are equal up to a certain tolerance.
